    multimedia/smplayer: update to 22.7.0 release (+)

    [22.7] - 2022-07-10
        Better statistic info in the OSD (Shift + I).
        Bug fixes regarding MPRIS2.
        MPRIS2 is compiled (but disabled by default) on Windows and Mac OS.
